basicDetails.schemeName: Providing Model Maps for Residential Construction

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Providing Model Maps for Residential Construction” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide landowners in Haridwar district with model maps for residential construction according to the size of their plots.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Model maps for residential construction are provided to all landowners across Haridwar district.
schemeContent.briefDescription: It aims to provide landowners in Haridwar district with model maps for residential construction according to the size of their plots.

children.text: The “Providing Model Maps for Residential Construction” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide landowners in Haridwar district with model maps for residential construction according to the size of their plots.
Model maps for residential construction are provided to all landowners across Haridwar district.

For the convenience of landowners in Haridwar district, model maps have been uploaded on the authority’s website. Landowners can select a model map according to the area of their plot and avail the facility.

applicationProcess.process_md: For the convenience of landowners in Haridwar district, model maps have been uploaded on the authority’s website. Landowners can select a model map according to the area of their plot and avail the facility.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.

children.text: All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.
